title: RESTORE - 211info
text: RESTORE NEWPORT RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells donated new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, and a variety of home improvement items. Proceeds from sales help build Habitat for Humanity homes for local low-income families. Donation pick-up and volunteer opportunities available. 134 E Olive Street Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: ReStore: Wednesday-Saturday 10am-6pm Donations: Wednesday-Saturday 10am-6pm, donation pick-up by appointment only Email (541) 264-8585 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 264-8585 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Visit website for a list of accepted donations and call for an appointment for donation pick-up. FEES: Varies by item. Delivery is available, and the fee varies depending on the distance to the delivery location. DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lincoln County SITE HOURS: Wednesday-Saturday 10am-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Right on Hwy 20 between Bottle Drop and the Eagles Aerie, behind Walgreens. Services: Building Materials/Supplies Donation Programs Donation Pickups Low Cost Building Materials/Supplies Thrift Shops If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. RESTORE NEWPORT
